title: volutaria lippii var. atlantica
intro: Volutaria lippii var. atlantica, also known as the Atlas Volutaria, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to the Atlas Mountains in North Africa. The medicinal properties of Volutaria lippii var. atlantica lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Volutaria lippii var. atlantica can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
